name: Tax-Exempt Recovery and Reuse of Spirits

eligibility.description: Available to manufacturers using processes where denatured spirits are expressed or evaporated; requires compliance with restoration regulations for reuse solely in manufacturing.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Manufacturers may recover denatured distilled spirits used in manufacturing processes and restore them for reuse in manufacturing without triggering new tax liabilities.
